# Bilag


[Tilsagn fra Styrelsen for Patientsikkerhed](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1lb2u4u6OQ1_8lsbzrB3dbheP6NS4rtYb/view?usp=sharing).

[Tilsagn fra praksisadministrationen Region Midt](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1naj3i651xArDDLVoObYqJye5XATgmdpR/view?usp=sharing).

[Listen over potentielle deltagere](Skriftlig deltagerindformation](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1lOyMTlMJhUp9QovMoAG3c2XYmHmw3YF8/view?usp=sharing).

[Skriftlig deltagerindformation](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1lOyMTlMJhUp9QovMoAG3c2XYmHmw3YF8/view?usp=sharing).




::: text-center
![](/images/rm-logo.png){width=200px}
:::
